paper_title: LiveMathBench: A Dynamic and Rigorous Mathematical Benchmark with G-Pass@k Metric
evaluation_method: Chinese National Math Olympiad problems from opencompass/LiveMathBench (config: v202412_CNMO_en). LLM-as-judge (Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct) determines correctness of generated answers. G-Pass@k metric provides continuous assessment of model performance across multiple sampling attempts, quantifying both peak performance potential and stability. Mathematical answer equivalence checking.
